text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's quite the scary face.
Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It is! I've just heard tell of a student
who is violating multiple school rules
on a regular basis!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Multiple school rules?! Are you saying there is a delinquent among our ranks?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Firsthand reports mention an incredibly
pale student walking around the school
IN THE MIDDLE OF THE NIGHT!!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! Leaving one's dorm after curfew is
STRICTLY prohibited!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's not all! This student has also been
sneaking into other students' rooms and
climbing onto their ceilings! INVADING
THEIR PRIVACY!!!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This cannot go on! We must see to it
that the culprit is punished AT ONCE!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, by these hands, we will guide this
delinquent down the path to redemption
and righteousness! Charge! Bakushiiin!!
